network_include.description: If non-empty, ONLY these network IDs or names are converted. Overrides network_exclude.

network_exclude.description: Network IDs or names to skip. Ignored when network_include is set.

synthesize_l1.description: Build a standard MX->MS->MR/MV branch topology when GET /topology/linkLayer returns no observed links (offline/virtual devices). Set false to emit devices only, no links.

add_internet_waypoint.description: Add a synthetic 'Internet' cloud waypoint and link each MX appliance WAN port to it.

include_clients.description: Draw network clients (from GET /networks/{id}/clients, fetched only with --include-clients) as PC endpoints. Off by default to keep diagrams clean.

stencil_overrides.description: Map of NS device name -> NS Stencil Type (Router/L3Switch/Switch/Firewall/WLC/AP/Server/Cloud/PC/Phone) to override the productType-based default.

color_overrides.description: Map of NS device name -> [R,G,B] to override the role-based 'Default' cell colour.

ap_management_model.description: Model each Meraki MR access point as the L2 bridge it actually is: the wired uplink carries the native L2 segment (matching the connected switch port, plus any VLAN-tagged SSID VLANs = a trunk); a synthetic 'Dummy_mgmt 0' management SVI is bound to that segment and receives the AP's management IP when one exists (lanIp); and each enabled SSID becomes a PHYSICAL port ('<SSID name> <n>', or 'wlan <n>' when the name is unknown) L1-linked to the same switch and bound to its L2 segment. Set false to fall back to placing the management IP directly on the physical uplink port.

ap_untagged_segment_name.description: FALLBACK native L2 segment name for an MR access point that has no upstream switch (e.g. attached straight to the MX). When the AP connects to a switch it instead REUSES that switch port's L2 segment name (e.g. 'Vlan1') so the two share one broadcast domain - a standalone name like 'untag' would form a separate domain and leave the AP isolated at L2. Tagged SSIDs always use their own 'Vlan<id>' segment. Only applies when ap_management_model is true.
